notes: Lesson 24 orientation (act 140) 'Graph Reactivation: One Loop, Swap the Container', 877.4s, 9 long family-map cues. New graph.py idiom lib (graph_group/container/grid_board/forest_nodes/parent_arrow/dist_badge) + arrays.code_line. Single -ql pass, clean (all 21 cues across L24 passed manim -s smoke first, then -ql muxed READ). Per-cue: all math/pedagogy correct, highlight matches narration, legible, safe-area guard passed, chunk timing within pin tolerance (<=0.066s auto-pad).
